2026-03-27T04:20:32.6208417Z Agent: 
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6208788Z Agent: ## Overview
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6209205Z Agent: 
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6210705Z Agent: In this JS SDK repository, management-plane packages are ARM-based and typically use the `@azure/arm-` prefix (for example, `@azure/arm-compute`). They are auto-generated from TypeSpec or Swagger. Our review focuses are:
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6212267Z Agent: - Public API surface
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6212793Z Agent: - Rule-based validations across files
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6213318Z Agent: 
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6213636Z Agent: Do not comment on:
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6214045Z Agent: - Style, formatting, or whitespace
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6214686Z Agent: - Implementation internals (private methods, internal helpers)
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6215664Z Agent: - Test files, samples, or documentation prose

2026-03-27T04:20:32.6216821Z Agent: Also, review suggestions should be well organized and provide clear guidance.
2026-03-27T04:20:32.6217583Z Agent:

2026-03-27T04:20:32.6225177Z Agent: - Carefully check that the package version is aligned across `package.json`, the management client context file under `src/api/` (for example, `src/api/*Context.ts` such as `src/api/managedOpsContext.ts`), and `CHANGELOG.md`. The agent should first discover the appropriate `*Context.ts` file in `src/api/` and then validate its version.
